name: FM Four
explanation: A programmable 4-operator FM synth. Four sine operators are wired by a selectable algorithm — a serial stack, two parallel FM pairs, or three modulators in parallel into one carrier — for everything from clangy basses to glassy bells and evolving pads. An exposed modulator ratio and FM depth set the timbre, operator feedback adds gritty 80s-digital edge, and an attack/release envelope shapes both the amplitude and the modulation index so the brightness evolves over each note. Controls: Ratio, FM Depth, Feedback, Algorithm, Attack, Release and Level.
